title: centaurea stenocarpa
intro: Centaurea stenocarpa, also known as Stiff-stemmed Star-thistle, is a flowering plant species native to Western Australia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Centaurea stenocarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Centaurea stenocarpa is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be consumed in a variety of ways to reap its medicinal benefits.
